ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT FONTENOT, DONNA L

APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DONNA FORTENOT'S HEARING ON WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS WAS HELD TODAY. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT PARTLY GRANTED AND PARTLY DENIED THE FEES AND COSTS. THE COURT GRANTED THE WAIVER OF JURY FEES ONLY. THE REMAINDER IS DENIED. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/JIROQUE; REPORTER: J. BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT FONTENOT, CARL R

APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CARL FORTENOT'S HEARING FOR WAIVER FOR COURT FEES AND COSTS IS HEARD TODAY. APPLICANT APPEARED. THE COURT FINDS THAT APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY FOR THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. CARL FORTENOT HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/JIROQUE; REPORTER: J. BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)
FEE PAID FOR FIRST APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT FONTENOT, DONNA L
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: FIRST APPEARANCE FEES PD BY DONNA FONTENOT.
